TN TableTop Nexus Desktop gaming lounge
HomeDownloadsGamesFAQSupport
Catalogue

Built-in games across three moods.

TableTop Nexus launches with a curated mix of strategy classics, card tables, and couch-friendly party formats.

Board

Chess

Classic tactics with legal move handling, move history, and offline play.

Board

Battleship

Fleet placement, hit tracking, and satisfying solo or local duels.

Card

Blackjack

Quick casino sessions with dealer logic, chip tracking, and polished table visuals.

Card

Hearts

Trick-taking pressure with rotating turns and score-aware play.

Card

Crazy Eights

Wild eights, suit shifts, and family-friendly discard pile tension.

Board

Ludo

Bright race-table momentum with captures, six-roll swings, and couch play.

Board

Backgammon

Dice-driven checker races with modern readability and quick setup.

Party

Trivia

Multiple-choice rounds, score tracking, and pack-ready prompt content.

Party

Drawing Club

Shared canvas play with rotating prompts and low-friction local scoring.

Party

Bluffing Room

Pass-and-play deduction where one player gets the wrong word.

TableTop Nexus

Offline-first board, card, and party games for polished desktop play.

Published by DigiSolUK. Need help? support@tabletopnexus.app
